name: segment number
description: Number of PC-SAFT segments used to represent component i.
main_purpose: Sets chain length and coarse-grained molecular size.
important_notes: Higher m_i generally means a longer or less spherical molecule.

name: segment diameter
description: Temperature-independent segment diameter of component i.
main_purpose: Sets the molecular size and packing length scale.
important_notes: Also enters effective temperature-dependent diameters used in several ePC-SAFT terms.

name: dispersion energy parameter
description: Segment energy parameter for non-specific attractive interactions.
main_purpose: Sets the strength of van der Waals-type attraction between segments.
important_notes: Also appears in the temperature-dependent effective segment diameter expression.

name: association energy
description: Site-specific association energy between sites on component i.
main_purpose: Sets the strength of hydrogen-bonding or other specific association interactions.
important_notes: Only relevant for associating components and association sites.

name: association volume
description: Effective association volume for the bonding sites on component i.
main_purpose: Sets the geometric probability or bonding volume for association.
important_notes: Works together with ε_hb^(AiBi)/k_B to control the association strength.

name: i
shows_up_in: Pure-component relative permittivity used in dielectric mixing rules.
important_notes: Controls electrostatic screening and ion solvation strength through the dielectric response.
column8: Important mainly for electrolyte applications and mixed-solvent dielectric rules.

name: binary interaction parameter
description: Unlike-pair binary interaction parameter used in the dispersion combining rule for ε_ij.
main_purpose: Tunes unlike-species energetic interactions when the default mixing rule is not sufficient.
important_notes: Usually fitted to binary mixture data and applied pairwise.
